action.reasoning: Observation: the ResNet50 diversity attempt underperformed (0.7603) because the ResNet members had weak validation accuracy, and the known best remains checkpoints/ensemble9_ep3.pt at 0.7668. Analysis: validation-tuned ensembling/calibration has repeatedly overfit, while adding weaker members dilutes the ensemble. A low-cost non-validation-tuned alternative is a uniform ConvNeXt model soup: all 9 ConvNeXt members share the same pretrained initialization and architecture, so averaging weights may preserve a flatter solution and improve generalization without increasing inference ensemble dilution. Decision: create a uniform weight-averaged single ConvNeXt checkpoint from the best 9-member ensemble and submit it; if it underperforms, final submission will revert to ensemble9_ep3.pt.
